title: Digital Door Knocking on Instagram: The DM Playbook
dek: Old-school agents knocked doors. The rental agent's version is quieter, faster, and doesn't require anyone to answer in a bathrobe: the Instagram DM, done professionally. Here's the playbook.
heroAlt: Digital Door Knocking on Instagram: The DM Playbook

blocks.html: Three audiences live on Instagram for you. Renters-to-be: people engaging with apartment tours, neighborhood pages, and "moving to Chicago" content. Buildings: most luxury properties run active accounts. Referral partners: gyms, salons, relocation-adjacent businesses in your neighborhoods.

blocks.text: The rule that makes it work

blocks.html: Never open with a pitch. Digital door knocking is still door knocking: bring value or don't knock.

The building play: follow your Power 25 buildings, engage genuinely with their posts for two weeks, then DM: "Love what you're doing with the amenity content. I'm a local leasing agent and I bring clients through [neighborhood] weekly. Who's the best person to coordinate showings with?" You're a familiar name before you ever ask.

The renter play: when someone comments "dream apartment" on a tour post or asks a question in a neighborhood group, answer the question fully, in public, no pitch. Then: "Happy to send a couple similar options if you're actually looking, no pressure." Helpfulness converts; thirst repels.

The content engine: your own posts do the heavy lifting. Post the buildings, the views, the process. When your profile proves you're a working professional, half the conversation is over before the DM opens.
Fifteen minutes, twice a day: reply to every comment and DM, engage with your buildings, send two or three value-first messages. Small, daily, compounding, exactly like the rest of this business.
The full organic client system is in my free ebook Luxury Leases, Real Profits. Better agents win.
